_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — every value below is a placeholder. Copy this file to 'coverletter-config.json' in the folder where you generate cover letters, then replace every field with YOUR OWN details. Your real details stay on your computer and are never uploaded by this plugin. Fields: 'name' (required) is shown centered + bold at the top and reused as the signature. 'address_lines' fill the LEFT of the contact row (use [] to omit). 'contact_lines' fill the RIGHT, top to bottom in the order listed; each shows 'text', hyperlinked when a 'url' is given — put phone / email / LinkedIn / GitHub / website here in whatever order you like.
name: Jordan Goose
